datasetInfo.title: Networks of Systemic Transformation
datasetInfo.description: Comprehensive Catalog of Sustainability, Community, and Consciousness Initiatives in Hungary

initiatives.name: MAPER Budapest and Surroundings Circle
initiatives.description: Urban permaculture, intensive small garden design, integration of community gardens.

initiatives.name: MAPER South Transdanubia Circle
initiatives.description: Hilly water retention, establishment of forest gardens (food forests), ecovillage synergies.

initiatives.name: MAPER Great Plain Circle (Danube-Tisza Interfluve)
initiatives.description: Swaying sand farming, drought-tolerant plant associations, rehabilitation of the farm world.

initiatives.name: MAPER North Hungary Circle
initiatives.description: Mountain permaculture, management of sloping areas, social inclusion through gardens.

initiatives.name: MAPER West Transdanubia Circle
initiatives.description: Blending traditional peasant farming with permaculture, cross-border relations.

initiatives.name: Csendüllő Garden of Life
initiatives.description: Compact service: vegetables + sprouts + community experience. Zero waste handover.

initiatives.name: Jászság Organic Garden
initiatives.description: Success story of an industrial worker turned farmer. Tomato specialties, herbs.

initiatives.name: I Raise a Garden
initiatives.description: Bio-intensive methods, exotic plants (lychee, okra), winter processed products.

initiatives.name: Panorama Eco-Garden
initiatives.description: Magnificent view, herb tours in protected areas, okra cultivation.

initiatives.name: Sun-braid Garden
initiatives.description: No-till (no turnover) soil cultivation, Asian specialties (water spinach), essential oils.

initiatives.name: MagosVölgy
initiatives.description: Tomato research, preservation of landraces, volunteer programs.

initiatives.name: Táncoskert
initiatives.description: Regenerative animal husbandry (Grey cattle, Mangalica), 'Chicken Leasing' program.

initiatives.name: Organic Poppy
initiatives.description: Sand farming, asparagus cultivation, Szeged pickup community.

initiatives.name: Kisdomb Eco-Garden
initiatives.description: Waldorf-style family farm, strong educational focus.

initiatives.name: Pallagvölgyi Organic Garden
initiatives.description: Municipal cooperation, social employment, kindergarten garden program.

initiatives.name: Vas Green Basket
initiatives.description: Local shopping community (SFSC).

initiatives.description: Local shopping community (SFSC).

initiatives.name: Gömörszőlős
initiatives.description: Model settlement of the 'Sustainable Village' program, the base of the Institute for Sustainable Development Foundation.

initiatives.name: Nagyszékely
initiatives.description: Local seed conservation, community orchardry, integration of 'gyüttment' (newcomer) families.

initiatives.name: Galgahévíz
initiatives.description: Technology-oriented ecovillage, energy independence, biogas utilization.

initiatives.name: Háttér Society
initiatives.description: LGBTQI rights, legal aid, helpline service, policy advocacy.

initiatives.name: National Federation of Autists (AOSZ)
initiatives.description: Advocacy for people living with autism, family support, sensitivity training.

initiatives.name: ÉFOÉSZ
initiatives.description: Support for people with intellectual disabilities, helping self-advocacy.

initiatives.name: Hungarian Women's Lobby
initiatives.description: Women's rights, gender equality, non-violence.

initiatives.name: Igazgyöngy Foundation
initiatives.description: Fighting deep poverty, arts education, community development.

initiatives.name: BAGázs Public Benefit Association
initiatives.description: Roma integration, slum rehabilitation, mentoring program.

initiatives.name: Menedék Association
initiatives.description: Social integration of migrants and refugees, legal assistance.

initiatives.name: Blue Line Child Crisis Foundation
initiatives.description: Child protection, 116-111 helpline, prevention.

initiatives.name: Roma Láng Association
initiatives.description: Preservation of Roma culture, advocacy.

initiatives.name: Misina Nature and Animal Protection Association
initiatives.description: Operation of a shelter and training center.

initiatives.name: Tenkesalja Animal Protection Association
initiatives.description: Operation of a small-area shelter.

initiatives.name: Mentsvár for Animals
initiatives.description: Animal shelter and prevention education.

initiatives.name: Tappancs Animal Protection Foundation
initiatives.description: The westernmost regional shelter network centered in Szeged.

initiatives.name: PCAS Animal Rescue
initiatives.description: Animal rescue and education campaign against the stray animal problem.

initiatives.name: National Animal Protection Foundation (Szeged)
initiatives.description: Organization for animal protection legislation and support.

initiatives.name: HEROSZ Székesfehérvár Animal Home
initiatives.description: Local base of the nation's oldest organization, orphaning and reception.

initiatives.name: Waldorf Institutions Network
initiatives.description: Education based on Rudolf Steiner's pedagogy, placing community building at the center. The network holds regular open days (Michaelmas, Advent).

initiatives.name: Alternative Secondary School of Economics (AKG)
initiatives.description: Alternative pedagogical center and workshop.

initiatives.name: Rogers Person-Centered School
initiatives.description: Alternative school applying person-centered pedagogy.

initiatives.name: Small Community Program - Human Ecology
initiatives.description: Human ecology course for the transmission of deep ecology and systems theory.

initiatives.name: Integral Academy
initiatives.description: Integral-view training school following Ken Wilber. (Founder: Bence Gánti)

initiatives.name: The Gate of Dharma Buddhist College and Church
initiatives.description: Central-European center of Buddhism. Events and education.

initiatives.name: Shambhala Tibet Center
initiatives.description: Meditation and cultural center (Tibet Cinema, yoga).

initiatives.name: Nonviolent Communication (NVC)
initiatives.description: Community and trainings organized based on Marshall Rosenberg's method.

initiatives.name: Community Energy Service Nonprofit Kft. (KESZ)
initiatives.description: Network mentored by MTVSZ, promoting energy sharing (SSE) at the condominium and municipal levels.
